verdict.evidence: Two tense/voice drifts detected: (1) 'on pudonnut maahan' (has fallen) → 'pudotettiin' (was brought down), changing intransitive to causative passive and altering the factual meaning; (2) 'on ollut paikalla' (has been on site) → 'lähetti' (sent), shifting from present perfect continuous state to simple past action.
